settings.heading: Price Match
settings.tab_content: We check our prices every day to ensure we can bring you the best price possible. In the unlikely case that you have found a cheaper price then please contact us on support@example.com and we'll do our best to answer your query right away!

settings.heading: Delivery Information
settings.tab_content:
The standard delivery from Monday to Friday is FREE
The express delivery from Monday to Friday is £14.99
The saturday delivery is £29.99
The sunday delivery is £34.99

settings.heading: Flexible Delivery
settings.tab_content:
We know that you expect your goods to be delivered promptly and efficiently. That’s why we have made it a priority at electricshop.com to deliver your goods as quickly as possible using our fast, efficient delivery service which comes direct to your home and is FREE for most items!

- We deliver seven days a week 
- Standard deliveries are despatched via specialist carriers and are normally delivered within 3-5 working days. 
- Express deliveries are dispatched same day (if ordered before 14:30) for delivery within 1-2 working days.
- For weekend deliveries, orders need to be placed by 14:30 on Friday.
- Larger Items are despatched using our team of specialist nationwide carriers. You will be contacted within 48 hours verifying your order and an estimated delivery date.
- Deliveries direct from manufacturers or suppliers can take a little longer but we will keep you informed and updated.

settings.heading: About this item
settings.text:
The Fitifun electronics tablets equipped with an quad-core 14 tablet that offers premium specifications at an affordable price. Featuring a powerful processor and a vivid 10.1-inch 1280*800 FHD high-definition display , you can immerse yourself in a realistic visual experience. Tablet pc with a 6000mAh battery that lasts up to 10 hours, 10 inch 14 tablet with 4GB RAM (via 2GB+2GB expansion) + 32GB ROM, Expand your storage capacity by adding 1TB with an TF card, giving you the freedom to stream, unleash your creativity on the go,10 inch android 14 tablet pc is equipped with a powerful dual camera, so you can capture the best moments in life and enjoy smooth video chat and audio-visual entertainment with your family.

The Fitifun tablet not only meets your daily needs but also serves as a gaming tablet and a learning tablet. It allows you to enjoy fast and efficient work, study, and entertainment anytime, anywhere! Thank you for choosing Fitifun products! At Fitifun, every tablet is crafted by technical experts with over 15 years of experience. Our rigorous quality control and technical testing ensure outstanding performance, surpassing other tablets in the same price range.

Please feel free to send us a note if you got any problem with this product.we will give you a satisfactory answer within 24 hours. Technical Specification Processor Brand‎: Allwinner CPU: Quad-core Processor OS: Android 14.0 Display: 10.1-inch Touch Screen Screen Resolution: 1280 * 800 IPS FHD Memory: 4 (2 + 2) GB + 32GB ROM (MicroSD Expandable up to 1TB) Battery: 6000 mAh WIFI: 2.4GHz Rear Camera: 2 MP Front Camera: 2 MP Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.0

  • ‌ANDROID 14 TABLET -10 inch tablet loaded with Android 14,features a high performance quad-core processor,delivering quick app launches,making your app run smoother. Perfect for working, reading, studying and entertainment.

  • 4GB+32GB STORAGE - 4GB (2GB+2GB expansion) RAM+32GB ROM,can be expanded up to 1TB TF card (not included), you can download and store your favorite books, songs, photos, movies, games and anything you want. You can fully enjoy without worrying about running out of space.

  • IPS DISPLAY AND DUAL CAMERA - 10 in HD tablet equipped with high resolutionof 10 inch 1280x800 IPS display. Sizing up to 10 inches, you get more space, best choice for movie and video viewing and site browsing.It has dual cameras with 2MP on the rear and 2MP on the front for taking amazing photos and video chatting.

  • 6000MAH LONG BATTERY LIFE - Equipped With a 6000mAh battery for 8-10 hours mixed use.Providing a long-lasting reading and watching times,enjoy your favorite activities and apps for longer.Convenient to charging via Type C USB cable.

    We aim to show you accurate product information. Manufacturers, suppliers and others provide what you see here, and we have not verified it. See our disclaimer

settings.heading: Wide and Bright Visuals With Smooth Movements
settings.text: Experience the joy of entertainment on the big and bright screen. The high refresh rate of the Galaxy Tab A9 screen allows you to dive into the visual effects with smooth and fluid movements. Even when you’re in the sun, enter the captivating world of your favorite content.

settings.heading: Save More Than You Like
settings.text: E++ Tab A9 and Tab A9+ come equipped with up to 8 GB of RAM, ensuring less delays while performing various tasks. In addition, the built-in 128 GB storage saves all your high resolution videos, photos and files. You can expand storage with a microSD card - up to 1 TB. Save more than you like and erase less.

settings.heading: Split the screen into three. Multiply your productivity.
settings.text: Perform multiple tasks at the same time. With the E++ Tab A9, you can sketch architectural plans, choose captivating visuals, and chat video calls - up to three applications on one screen, without ever closing a window.

settings.heading: Let yourself be involved by a powerful audio
settings.text: Dive into a rich soundscape with speakers that provide an engaging audio experience. Whether you're enjoying a movie or music, the E++ Tab A9 allows you to fully engage in 3D sound with stunning clarity and depth.
